title: Silent Blue
body:
This resource pack retextures some of silent gear & gem textures.

Currently retextures most of Silent Gem's textures and the Sword texture of Silent Gear.

![Retexture of Silent Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MjsNTRqg/images/e5810197c94da919c5c3ca3abb8d4d08e0e43964.jpeg)
